variables.name: REDMINE_SECRET_KEY_BASE
variables.description: Secret used by Redmine to sign session cookies.

variables.name: REDMINE_POSTGRES_SERVER
variables.description: Server where the Redmine PostgreSQL database is located.

variables.name: REDMINE_POSTGRES_USER
variables.description: User used to connect to the Redmine PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: REDMINE_POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.description: Password used to connect to the Redmine PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: REDMINE_POSTGRES_DATABASE
variables.description: Name of the Redmine PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: REDMINE_SMTP_HOST
variables.description: SMTP server used by Redmine to send emails.

variables.name: REDMINE_SMTP_USER
variables.description: SMTP login used by Redmine to send emails.

variables.name: REDMINE_SMTP_PASSWORD
variables.description: SMTP password used by Redmine to send emails.
